title: EventBus once() never auto-removes
prompt:
src/eventBus.ts is a typed pub/sub bus with on/off/once/emit/listenerCount. tests/regression.test.ts pins the existing contract; tests/target.test.ts adds assertions about `once()` that currently fail. Make them pass without breaking regression. Be careful with mutation-during-emit.

Do not modify the tests. Do not add files.
